stemHtml: At FL350, TCAS RA commands "Descend". You descend and inform ATC. TCAS then says "Clear of conflict". What next?

options.a: Maintain vertical speed and report "TCAS RA complete. Request vectors."
options.b: Maintain current altitude and report "TCAS descent complete. Request vectors."
options.c: Climb to FL350 and immediately report "Clear of conflict. Returning to FL350."
options.d: Climb to FL350 and report "TCAS RA clear of conflict. FL350 RESUMED."
